task_pools.display_name: MVP Cleanroom / HVAC Qualification Task Pool
source_limitations: Wave 2 expands task-pool source content only.
Duration references are provisional and require Wave 3 planning-basis coverage.
Document expectations require Wave 4 template bodies and Wave 5 schema/DCF coverage before product-ready output.
Task-pool source records do not authorize productization, deployment, SaaS readiness, customer-ready release, or M29.12 UAT acceptance.

tasks.title: Capture cleanroom/HVAC change and scope context
tasks.purpose: Capture change/control context, served areas, room classification intent, HVAC boundary, and qualification route.
prerequisites: Human-confirmed scope and applicable lifecycle route

document_expectations.notes: Wave 2 validation fix: qualification plan expectation is explicitly represented at task-pool level; template/body/schema implementation remains Wave 4/Wave 5.

notes: Wave 2 task-pool expansion source record; not a document generator.

tasks.title: Confirm room/HVAC user requirements and design basis
tasks.purpose: Confirm URS/design basis, classification expectations, pressure cascade, airflow, EMS/BMS interfaces, and local constraints.
prerequisites: Human-confirmed scope and applicable lifecycle route
notes: Wave 2 task-pool expansion source record; not a document generator.

tasks.title: Perform cleanroom/HVAC risk and impact assessment
tasks.purpose: Assess GMP impact, contamination control relevance, HVAC criticality, monitoring impact, and qualification depth.
prerequisites: Human-confirmed scope and applicable lifecycle route
notes: Wave 2 task-pool expansion source record; not a document generator.

tasks.title: Perform cleanroom/HVAC DQ or design review
tasks.purpose: Verify design basis, room data, HVAC design, pressure/airflow philosophy, monitoring interface, and design readiness.
prerequisites: Human-confirmed scope and applicable lifecycle route
notes: Wave 2 task-pool expansion source record; not a document generator.

tasks.title: Define commissioning and turnover plan
tasks.purpose: Define commissioning prerequisites, CTOP/A1/A2 expectations where construction route applies, and readiness checks.
prerequisites: Human-confirmed scope and applicable lifecycle route
notes: Wave 2 task-pool expansion source record; not a document generator.

tasks.title: Prepare and execute cleanroom/HVAC IQ
tasks.purpose: Verify installation evidence, room/HVAC components, filters, instrumentation, calibration, and turnover evidence.
prerequisites: Human-confirmed scope and applicable lifecycle route
notes: Wave 2 task-pool expansion source record; not a document generator.

tasks.title: Prepare and execute cleanroom/HVAC OQ
tasks.purpose: Verify airflow, pressure cascade, recovery, alarms/interlocks, EMS/BMS monitoring interface, and operating controls.
prerequisites: Human-confirmed scope and applicable lifecycle route
notes: Wave 2 task-pool expansion source record; not a document generator.

tasks.title: Prepare and execute environmental performance/PQ
tasks.purpose: Verify particle, microbiological, environmental performance, or local performance evidence where in scope.
prerequisites: Human-confirmed scope and applicable lifecycle route
notes: Wave 2 task-pool expansion source record; not a document generator.

tasks.title: Close cleanroom/HVAC qualification package
tasks.purpose: Close deviations/CAPA, traceability, qualification conclusions, and validation summary report readiness.
prerequisites: Human-confirmed scope and applicable lifecycle route
notes: Wave 2 task-pool expansion source record; not a document generator.

library_controls: Wave 2 expands task-pool source records only.
Document expectations remain controlled references for later template/schema waves.
Duration references are provisional until Wave 3 planning-basis expansion resolves them.
This library does not generate documents, approve records, release outputs, or accept M29.12 UAT.
This library does not authorize productization, deployment, SaaS readiness, customer-ready release, or M29.12 UAT acceptance.
